name: CRUD Barang Keluar - Tambah, Filter Tanggal, Filter Gudang, Hapus
description: Test CRUD barang keluar: input pengeluaran barang dari gudang, filter tanggal, filter gudang, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login button
User is redirected to dashboard successfully
Click Barang Keluar menu item in the sidebar to navigate to the stock out page
Barang Keluar page is visible with a transaction list table
Click the Buat Transaksi button to open the create stock out form
The create stock out form or modal is open showing warehouse and item fields
Select a warehouse (Gudang Asal) from the gudang dropdown
Select a product from the barang dropdown and fill in the quantity field
Click the Simpan Draft button to save the transaction
The new stock out transaction appears in the list table with Draft status
Fill in the tanggal dari (start date) filter with the first day of the current month
Table is filtered and shows transactions within the date range
Select a warehouse in the gudang filter dropdown
Table is filtered by the selected warehouse
Click the delete/Hapus button on the draft transaction that was just created
A confirmation modal or dialog appears asking to confirm deletion
Confirm the deletion by clicking Ya or Hapus in the confirmation dialog
The transaction is removed from the table successfully
